title: dalbergia lanceolaria var. hemsleyi
intro: Dalbergia lanceolaria var. hemsleyi, also known as the Philippine mahogany or Philippine redwood, is a variety of the Dalbergia lanceolaria tree, native to the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic compounds. The health benefits of Dalbergia lanceolaria var. hemsleyi include treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as acting as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal uses, and it may also be used in traditional medicine as a tincture or powder.
